message:
feat(engine): integrate FrankenTUI adapter with SlotRegistry snapshots

Add SlotRegistry integration to ReplacementProgressDashboardView,
enabling the TUI dashboard to render live engine state directly from
the slot registry rather than requiring manual data assembly.

New constructors:
- from_slot_registry_snapshot(): builds a full dashboard view from
  live registry state, mapping slot health/promotion/risk metadata
  to dashboard columns
- refreshed_from_slot_registry_snapshot(): incrementally refreshes an
  existing view from updated registry state, preserving view identity

Supporting helpers map promotion status labels, health indicators,
risk levels, lineage/evidence references, blocked promotion reasons,
and rollback event summaries into the dashboard's display model.

Integration tests cover drilldown reference accuracy, blocked promotion
rendering, and refresh-on-demotion scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
